title: Wizarding MC
description: A Mod that adds wands/spells from the Harry potter/Wizarding world into Minecraft!
body:
WIZARDING MC
------------------------------
In Wizarding MC you get differnt wands that focus on a single spell! To use craft these wands id recommend finding them in EMI!


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
All spells: \
Stupefy \
Incendio \
Avada kedavra \



</details>
